# Kashyap Patel | Cinemagraph

> Commercial photographer and filmmaker based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India.

## Summary
Kashyap Patel creates cinemagraphs, photography and film for brands across fashion, food & hospitality, jewellery, products and interiors.

## Services
- Fashion photography
- Food & hospitality photography
- Jewellery photography
- Product photography
- Interior photography
- Commercial film
- Cinemagraph production

## Location
Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
